conservative.name: Commandment of Brass
conservative.requirements:
6 power
Target complex machine with significant metal parts (such as a clock or a firearm_ within medium range

success.description: The metal components of the target machine deform and twist, making it completely unusable
As above, and if the target was an item with the Unreliable quality, it misfires as if it had rolled sufficient

boon.description: One creature wielding or crewing the machine suffers 1 stress

reckless.name: Commandment of Brass
reckless.requirements:
6 power
Target complex machines with significant metal parts (such as clocks or firearms) within close range

success.description: The metal components of the target machines deform and twist, making it completely unusable

boon.description: One creature wielding or crewing the machine(s) suffers 1 stress

chaosStar.description: Every machine within close range of the caster explodes, with catastrophic effects

challenge.description: Special: For each target after the first, add to the dice pool
